name: joplin-curl
description: Persist Joplin clipper settings once and let Codex inspect or update Joplin notes, tags, and Joplin-backed LLM wiki content through curl-backed helper commands.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse saved Joplin clipper settings for notes and Joplin LLM wiki workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Joplin Curl when Codex should read, search, create, or update notes in a local Joplin client, or when it should scaffold and maintain a Joplin-backed LLM wiki. The plugin stores the clipper base URL, port, and token once in a local config file, then reuses that config through a helper CLI that executes curl requests against the Joplin Data API.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Joplin clipper connection and reuse it for future note tasks.
Find a Joplin note by title and update its body.
Create a Joplin-based LLM wiki scaffold and maintain its notes.
